purpose: Registry for direct RSS feeds and RSSHub route candidates used by the feed discovery stack. Only verified concrete routes or direct feeds may be enabled for OPML import.

verification_summary.method: upstream RSSHub route-code inspection plus local runtime smoke test where available
notes: YouTube /youtube/channel/:id route exists upstream, but the initial smoke-test channel returned an empty route at runtime and is disabled.
YouTube official channel RSS should be preferred when channel_id is known and the feed returns items.
Telegram /telegram/channel/:username route exists upstream and can be used for public channel previews; no concrete market-radar Telegram feed is enabled yet.
Threads /threads/:user route exists upstream, but no concrete market-radar account is enabled yet.
Instagram should not use a guessed /instagram route; upstream visible route is picnob.info redirect and requires extra runtime support, so it remains disabled.
The previous /github/repos/DIYgod/RSSHub/releases candidate was not verified as a valid RSSHub releases route; GitHub official releases.atom is used instead.

feeds.name: RSSHub GitHub releases Atom
feeds.verification_rule: official GitHub Atom feed; project updates are infrastructure signals, not market evidence by themselves

feeds.name: RSSHub YouTube route smoke seed
feeds.verification_rule: upstream route path exists, but local runtime test returned route is empty; keep disabled until a concrete active channel is chosen and tested

feeds.name: RSSHub YouTube channel route template
feeds.verification_rule: upstream route path exists; replace channel_id and prefer official YouTube RSS when available before enabling a concrete feed

feeds.name: RSSHub Telegram channel route template
feeds.verification_rule: upstream route path exists; public channels only; verify official identity and cross-check major claims before use

feeds.name: RSSHub Threads public account route template
feeds.verification_rule: upstream route path exists; enable only after concrete public account is selected and route response is tested

feeds.name: RSSHub Picnob Instagram public account route template
feeds.verification_rule: do not guess /instagram route; upstream picnob.info route exists but needs runtime support and concrete account testing before enablement

feeds.name: Direct RSS official newsroom template
feeds.verification_rule: replace feed_url_template with official RSS/Atom URL and verify usage policy
